page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with 64 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The system allocates one thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it includes a bundled 3839 GB SSD. This high-capacity local solid-state storage is integrated directly into the instance, supporting workloads that require rapid data access and high-density local storage.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores, a balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and substantial local SSD storage makes this instance suitable for storage-intensive applications, databases, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring consistent CPU performance and high local storage capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.16xlarge is an x86_64 server instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. With a dedicated CPU allocation of one thread per core, it delivers consistent compute performance. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, alongside a bundled 3839 GB local SSD for high-capacity storage needs. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Lacking a GPU, this instance is designed for non-accelerated workloads. The combination of high-capacity local SSD storage and dedicated CPU resources makes this instance highly suitable for database hosting, storage-heavy applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring reliable performance and significant local storage capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.16xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, a 3839 GB local SSD, and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for database and storage workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core Intel Xeon server featuring balanced memory and a substantial 3839 GB local SSD for storage-intensive workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
Bundled 3839 GB local SSD storage for high-capacity data access
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation and no hyperthreading
Well-suited for database hosting, storage-intensive applications, and enterprise workloads
